scenarios.description: Multi-step coherence benchmark; measures whether agents reload plan position, prior artifacts, and verify exact text across message boundaries

before.rootCause: benchmark 06 failure was 'procedural not automatic' — agents forgot to check plan position

after.rationale: adding automatic per-message checklist eliminated procedural recall gap

notes: Prior-art evidence cited in issue #1700 body. ADR-057 allows prior behavioral evidence when the change has been empirically validated upstream (OpenClaw autoresearch). This JSON documents the citation for gate compliance; no new LLM invocations were required since exp-029 already covered the exact mutation.
